text:
BOTTOM LINE — Small caps led rebound, semis crushed, oil eased. US500 +0.88% to 7264 recovered Monday's rout via tech strength despite Iran tensions. Flows favored IWM +1.68% on low-conviction volume, semis +4.64% signaling AI chip accumulation.

INDICES — VIX 17.4 down. IWM +1.68%, QQQ +1.30%, SPY +0.80%, DIA +0.69%. Small > large by 0.38pp. Oil -2.33% most notable.

VOLUME — QQQ 0.8x, SPY 0.6x vol_ratio. Elevated vol in XLB 1.0x, XLRE 1.1x shows materials attention amid +1.74% gains. Low-conviction rally as SPY vol down + price up, IWM accumulation on 0.8x vol.

SECTORS — XLK Technology +2.21%, XLB Materials +1.74%, XLI Industrials +0.84%, XLP Staples +0.62%, XLV Healthcare +0.39%, XLY Discretionary +0.30%, XLRE Real Estate +0.20%, XLE Energy +0.10%, XLF Financials +0.02%, XLU Utilities +0.00%, XLC Comms -0.40%. WGMI +9.19%, SOXX +4.47% topped; ARKG -2.62%, UNG -2.83% bottomed.

THE 7s — Semi +4.64% (MU strongest +11.76%, QCOM weakest +0.19%), Fab +4.57% (strongest MU +11.76%, weakest INTC -3.0%), Cloud +1.73%, New Metals +1.50%, Freight +1.25%; Defense -2.01% (HII weakest -10.25%, strongest diverged), Energy -0.61%, New Staples -0.77%.

FED & LIQUIDITY — Jun 17 FOMC, CME hold 100%. USD stress 35/100 normal, Reserve Scarcity 96th percentile most stressed. TED 0.09%.

POSITIONING — SPY PCR 1.13 elevated protection, QQQ 2.39 extreme fear; skews +6-8.9% put premium. SPY spot above GEX flip 720. VIX 17.4 below 20d MA 18.5 complacency. MOVE 76.8 elevated bond stress.

CROSS-ASSET — Oil -2.33% eased on Iran ceasefire hopes, lifting semis +4.64% via lower input costs. Gold +0.86% diverged from flat dollar +0.07%.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed 64 Greed. Top movers: MU +11.76% semis, WGMI +9.19% industry, HII -10.25% defense. 20d momentum: XLK +20.52% best sector, Semi +49.77% best basket; XLV -0.87% worst sector, Medtech -8.37% worst basket. HII vol 3.6x + price -10.25% distribution.

WATCH — HII -10.25% vol spike 3.6x distribution eyes defense rebound. MU +11.76% Semi leader, momentum break. XLK +2.21% vol steady, gamma near QQQ flip 675.
